feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Ocarina of Time Remake
entry.content: So I know some if not most of you fags are gonna hate it. Hell most of you already hate it. But for those who don’t, what would you like to see out of it? Personally I would like: >A much larger Hyrule field with shit actually in it. >Castle town should also be expanded with more to do. >More enemy variety. >More dungeons. >Decent camera. >Navi settings to make it stop handholding you. >horseback combat felt added it at the last second, so definitely more with it. Anything else you would like to
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: OK, tried my best and I've run into enough walls that I have to ask. Playing La …
entry.content: OK, tried my best and I've run into enough walls that I have to ask. Playing La Mulana for the first time, getting frustrated often but overall fun game. However, there is an issue with this room. I know this is where I activate the area boss fight, I saw the ankh showing up, but decided to leave it for later because I wanted to beat the first area boss (which I had missed previously, my first boss was the mine cart chase) So I get that done, and now I want to beat the waterfall area boss, I ret
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Dr. Doom is the main character in the next Avenger's movie. Bold move, but I'm …
entry.content: >Dr. Doom is the main character in the next Avenger's movie. Bold move, but I'm not sure how that's gonna work. Are we supposed to root for the guy? Is the movie about his downfall? People who've read the comics probably have an idea of how the movie will play out.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.content: >owns a cat >is a hopeless romantic and nice guy >can't talk to girls >gets made fun of women for ordering girly drinks >lives in his granny's house >works a dead end job in his mid 20's >despite being White, loves a mestiza girl >has oneitis over a girl instead of fucking every girl he meets >forces a girl to love him instead of rizzing her into bed >when he gets her into bed, he sleeps on the floor like a child >he cries and freaks out like a girl instead of being a man and using force and log
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: How the fuck was Palworld 1.0 this much of a success? It was a hit at launch but…
entry.content: How the fuck was Palworld 1.0 this much of a success? It was a hit at launch but the entire fanbase vacated over night because of how boring and shit it is. I legit don’t get why people are coming back, it’s worse than modern GF Pokemon by a mile and those games have questionable quality
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.content: >Cyberpunk Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84189052/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.o

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >One day, Bugs was seen walking into the Federal building. He didn’t tell anybod…
entry.content: >One day, Bugs was seen walking into the Federal building. He didn’t tell anybody one word. Not one word. And one thing for sure, he didn’t go there for fucking lunch. >Turns out Sally did tell somebody he had to go in there for something. They just forgot to tell somebody else. Why is the mob like this? They kill their friend and it's an oopsies.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /int/ International: I'm scared of going to Italy
entry.content: Bros I'm flying to Italy next month and I was checking the streets near my hotel on Google maps, and it looked like a fucking shithole? There were like 30 guys hanging around in a corner doing nothing at all, just hanging out on both sides of the street, and most of them were dressed like pakis! What the fuck is going on in Italy? Is the entire country like this now? I thought it was a meme? Google told me the place was only like 10% muslim but on google maps like 50% of people in the street loo
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: ADL
entry.content: Is the ADL actually on our side or just taking advantage to sow racial divisions for their plot? They appear to be somewhat open to understanding ongoing trends opening up to the real world. They could either have actively censored or at least attempted to say "hey, this is bad" but every one of their pages just openly shares outstanding examples of memes. It's actively sharing shit to the real world and gen z, and now alpha, chuds just eat it up. How are they honestly expecting the world to rea
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I have a bad feeling about everything, /bant/
entry.content: It seems that the stupid bitch I have for a mother will finally confront my brother, and tell him that he either gives more money for the house and cleans his room, or he can go fuck himself somewhere else If he dares to raise the voice or resist to his obligations, I'll go and beat the shit out of him But, I'm a bit scared. You see, I always sleep with a hatchet at my side. I'm thinking that I won't go and confront him with my bare fist, but rather with the hatchet It doesn't matter if it's jus
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Which is the better band: Foreigner, Bad Company, King Crimson, or Sabaton?
entry.content: I say Sabaton. With its thundering riffs that march through history, its choruses with powerful synths, it is one of the greatest bands of all time. Neither Foreigner nor Bad company could be this, they are music for dads to listen to while drinking a beer after working. Lazy music for lazy limp wrist men who do not wish to drive a panzer and conquer empires. And King Crimson is mere noise, there are not even attempts at riffs. What are your opinions?
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /security and privacy/
entry.content: I use QubesOS with detached boot partition on 2 duplicated USB drives with any data that rests on the SSD/HDDs being encrypted with LUKS2. Whonix gateway is proxied through a VPN qube to hide Tor IPs (can't hide communication patterns) without bridges since bridge IPs can be farmed. Sometimes Tor through I2P outproxy or vice-versa or with different anonymizing network overlays. Clients used for browsing are only opened in on-RAM ephemeral qubes with no access to permanent storage. Attack surface
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What is the future for TVs?
entry.content: Literally every Japanese brand is dead and belongs to the Chinese >Sharp is Foxconn >Sony sold 51% of its Bravia TVs to TCL >Panasonic is doing the same with Skyworth >Toshiba is just a name used by Hisense That means only LG and Samsung manufacture their own TV's (and they're south korean)
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: does /g/ employ crack head technology
entry.content: my room was getting very warm and i did not want to pay more for electricity (a/c is overkill). so i thought for a bit and had an epiphany: the mail trucks used by USPS have a 6-inch dashboard fan. they do not work for postal workers in extreme heat outside, but might help me indoors. so i have purchased one of the same size and specs (runs on AC though, mail trucks use DC). and it is very effective. noisy? a bit, but it drowns out the far more annoying amazon 767s over my house. idk
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: What is the best two car garage that includes a daily driver and a utility vehic…
entry.content: What is the best two car garage that includes a daily driver and a utility vehicle, with only a 30k budget. Do you spend more on the car since it's where you'll be most days and a cheap pick up? Or do you spend more on the truck since cheap trucks are likely to be dogged out. Maybe spend it all on the best half ton around? Or get a Maverick to split the difference? Or even substitute the truck for a more affordable SUV and a utility trailer? Is there even a right answer?
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I cant believe it's this tough to sell a car now a days
entry.content: im selling got a 1994 chevy 1500 exactly like pic for $4000 or better offer. >ive had three people show up low ball me nitpick at mechanical details on a 30-year-old car. >and the last two I believe were incompetent retards that made convinced me on keeping this truck
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /bwg/ Blacked Waifus General #367
entry.content: Gyaru Edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/gay shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. All games, anime and gacha waifus welc
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: FFX 25th anniversary
entry.content: https://x.com/NaoraYusuke/status/20 78781791868170269 Yesterday was the 25th anniversary of FFX, huh.I’ve been allowed to do all kinds of work on FF, not just the art, but FFX was the first time I cut the ending storyboards.Most of the scenes were already moving in my head, but Yuna’s speech part was difficult, so I asked Akira Oguro for help and got some real persuasive power from him.Even before that, I had done flashy scenes like Sephiroth in FF7 ripping off the Jenova decorations, but lookin
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Emulators feel icky to me. I don't care about the ethics of it or anything like …
entry.content: Emulators feel icky to me. I don't care about the ethics of it or anything like that. I guess it's just because I grew up on consoles and don't see my PC/Laptops as "gaming devices". I download an emulator, start messing with settings and hook up a controller and it's just like someone's microwaving my brain with anxiety waves. It's not hard, I just don't like it for some reason. I intensely dislike emulating games and I don't really get why.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: The truth of the matter is that Nolan is a fine director (if at times bland and …
entry.content: The truth of the matter is that Nolan is a fine director (if at times bland and sterile) and storyteller, but he has an absolutely tin ear for on-screen dialogue. He is in desperate need of a screenwriter partner whom he can supply his story ideas and whose finished script he can adjust to his vision, e.g. how Fincher worked with Sorkin on Social Network.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Remember when people were saying console players were too dumb for Death Strandi…
entry.content: Remember when people were saying console players were too dumb for Death Stranding 2, that's why nobody talked about it? That the PC release was going to bring back the real fans and that it would sell a heckin epic billion copies, a trillion threads? The PC release came and went just as quickly. What happens now?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I've played and beat JRPG's in the past, but honestly, they feel like games you …
entry.content: I've played and beat JRPG's in the past, but honestly, they feel like games you can only enjoy when you're a kid who can sit there for an entire summer playing one game 8+ hours a day. They're not BAD games, they're just very hard to sit down and play to the end with how many options we have these days.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: 144gb vram, 256gb of ram... and no kimi k3
entry.content: I have 6 3090s and I have no hope of running kimi. The qwen models seem to have no clue how to use mcp tools which is the best part of local models or models on your computer. I've had fable for a few days. And in that time I have because spoiled. Gluttonous. The higher usage levels, the ability to just let it go is actually dangerous. Not because it made mistakes, but because it didn't. I didn't need to review changes as much which hurt my knowledge of my own code base. But if kimi is even clos
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Full cast for "It Follows" sequel THEY FOLLOW
entry.content: >Maika Monroe back as Jay. >Naomi Ackie. >Jackie Earle Haley. >Justine Lupe. >Jayne Taini. >Melora Walters. >Michael Gandolfini. >Jan Hoag. >Natalie Shinnick. >Ben Krieger. >Tom Pecinka. >Anna Mirodin. https://deadline.com/2026/07/they-f ollow-cast-jackie-earle-haley-micha el-gandolfini-justine-lupe-12369830 18/

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Just got a new job in data management. What are some video games I can play at w…
entry.content: Just got a new job in data management. What are some video games I can play at work on my phone? I downloaded Castlevania Aria of Sorrow to play but using the touch screen controls are miserable. I need something non-actiony that will keep me entertained.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games
